qa_pairs.question: What topics does the "Migrating to the upgraded national systems" webinar address regarding the new infrastructure?
qa_pairs.answer: The webinar addresses concerns and questions users might have, such as how the upgrade will affect their workflow, significant changes to job scheduling and file systems, and how to make the best use of the increased computing capacity of the upgraded clusters, particularly in regards to computing nodes becoming much "fatter" (many more CPU cores per node), and details about GPU computing.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find recordings and materials from the "Migrating to the upgraded national systems" webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: Recordings and materials from previous SHARCNET webinars are available at http://youtube.sharcnet.ca.
